examples: He used his newspapers to beguile the readers into buying shares in his company.
Pleasure him with sports, beguile him in wholesome ways, so that his health come again.
Tis not much, your Majesty, yet perchance it may beguile a short half-hour for want of a better.
No one uses mystery to beguile consumers better than Apple Chief Steve Jobs.
You can find it all, to beguile those long summer days and evenings, here.
